problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Shape. Shape memory alloy phase transition directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
